product_overview: A clinic web platform for patients, doctors, and admins to manage appointments and monitor live queue status. Users can sign in, register, book appointments, manage queue flow, and review operational analytics from role-based dashboards.
core_goals: Let patients create and manage clinic appointments
Let patients monitor live queue position and wait time
Let doctors manage today’s queue and update consultation progress
Let admins review clinic operations and queue metrics

features.name: User Login
features.description: Allows returning users to access the platform with email and password credentials.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> See patient, doctor, or admin dashboard based on account role
Navigate to /login -> Enter incorrect credentials -> Submit login form -> See an error message

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Allows new patients to create an account and enter the platform as a patient user.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Fill in name -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit registration form -> See patient dashboard

features.name: Patient Book Appointment
features.description: Allows authenticated patients to book a new appointment by choosing a doctor, date, and available time slot.
user_flows: Navigate to /patient/book -> Select a specialty and doctor -> Pick a date -> Select an available time slot -> Submit booking request -> See the new appointment reflected in the patient experience

features.name: Patient Live Queue Monitoring
features.description: Allows authenticated patients to view live queue progress, including estimated wait time and their position in line.
user_flows: Navigate to /patient/live-queue -> View estimated wait time -> View position in queue -> Observe live queue updates as the clinic queue advances

features.name: Doctor Queue Management
features.description: Allows authenticated doctors to manage today’s queue by updating patient status and recording consultation notes.
user_flows: Navigate to /doctor/queue -> Review the list of patients in today’s queue -> Mark a patient as arrived -> Start consultation for the patient -> Mark the patient completed -> Add consultation notes

features.name: Admin Insights & Management
features.description: Allows authenticated admins to review operational analytics and global queue metrics from the admin dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> View appointment analytics charts -> View global queue metrics -> Review operational insights

routes.description: Patient dashboard showing upcoming appointments and queue status
Patient live queue monitoring and wait time estimator
Doctor appointment management and consultation notes

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password credentials
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials or redirect on success

features.name: User Registration
user_interactions: Redirect to patient dashboard on success

user_interactions: Pick a date on the calendar

features.name: Doctor Queue Management
features.description: Doctor calls patients and manages the current queue
user_interactions: View list of today's patients in queue
Add consultation notes via AI Assistant panel
